utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 6 items: property; financing; legal_services; moving_services; setup_services; total_budget. In the final solution, the sections are: selected_property; financing_options; additional_services (which contains legal_services, property_survey_costs, moving_services, utility_setup); consolidated_package_total. Mapping them: 1) property: selected_property exists with details and price → covered. 2) financing: financing_options with terms/fees → covered. 3) legal_services: present under additional_services. Costs provided → covered. 4) moving_services: present with costs → covered. 5) setup_services: utility_setup present → covered. 6) total_budget: consolidated_package_total exists but lacks a complete cost breakdown (only property price and narrative ranges; no summed totals). Thus 5 fully specified; 1 not fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution selects one purchase property: Historic Townhouse, and lists financing options (Traditional Mortgage and Cash Purchase), legal services (Basic Legal Package and Premium Legal Package), property surveys (Basic Survey, Full Structural Survey, Specialist Survey), moving services (Standard Moving, Premium Moving), and utility setup (Basic Utilities, Premium Utilities). I matched each named item to the exact corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings and extracted their numeric ratings.
